flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at City Colleges of Chicago-Harold Washington College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (4.1k vs 5.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at City Colleges of Chicago-Harold Washington College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).
